headline: Astro one-page factory proven; 3 placeholder preview apps deployed behind the basic-auth gate. Prospect→Astro site bridge live-verified end-to-end: scraped WA lead → two-axis scored → generated site → live noindex Vercel preview (Cascade Fence & Deck, Lacey WA). Engine still frozen pending ops cutover. Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
